semantic.role: Package lockfile for the ArchSpine project, ensuring reproducible dependency resolution and deterministic builds.
invariants: Node.js version must satisfy engines constraint (>=20.18.1 <21 || >=22)
All dependency versions are locked and immutable

English.role: Package lockfile for the ArchSpine project, ensuring reproducible dependency resolution and deterministic builds.

parameter_definitions.lockfileVersion: Specifies the lockfile format version (3). Enforces deterministic installs and supports workspaces.
parameter_definitions.requires: Boolean flag indicating that the root package has dependencies to resolve.
parameter_definitions.engines: Defines the required Node.js version range (>=20.18.1 <21 || >=22). Startup fails if not satisfied.
parameter_definitions.bin: Maps CLI commands 'archspine' and 'spine' to dist/cli/index.js. Global tool entry points.
parameter_definitions.@ast-grep/lang-c: AST parser for C language. Critical for code analysis features.
parameter_definitions.@google/generative-ai: Generative AI SDK. Powers AI-based interactions in the tool.
parameter_definitions.better-sqlite3: SQLite binding. Used for local caching and state persistence.
parameter_definitions.vitepress: Documentation site generator (dev only). Not included in production installs.
parameter_definitions.vitest: Unit test framework (dev only). Ensures code quality via automated testing.

English.stability_and_risks: This lockfile eliminates version drift across environments, ensuring identical dependency trees. However, failure to regenerate after dependency changes can cause installation errors. Security risks arise from outdated packages with known vulnerabilities; regular npm audit and dependency updates mitigate this. The engines constraint enforces a specific Node.js range, which may block deployment on unsupported runtime versions.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 项目的包锁定文件，确保可重现的依赖解析和确定性构建。

parameter_definitions.lockfileVersion: 指定锁定文件格式版本（3）。强制确定性安装并支持工作区功能。
parameter_definitions.requires: 布尔标志，指示根包有需要解析的依赖关系。
parameter_definitions.engines: 定义所需的 Node.js 版本范围（>=20.18.1 <21 或 >=22）。若不合要求则启动失败。
parameter_definitions.bin: 将 CLI 命令 'archspine' 和 'spine' 映射到 dist/cli/index.js。全局工具入口点。
parameter_definitions.@ast-grep/lang-c: C 语言的 AST 解析器。对代码分析功能至关重要。
parameter_definitions.@google/generative-ai: 生成式 AI SDK。为工具中的 AI 交互提供支持。
parameter_definitions.better-sqlite3: SQLite 绑定。用于本地缓存和状态持久化。
parameter_definitions.vitepress: 文档站点生成器（仅开发依赖）。生产环境不会安装。
parameter_definitions.vitest: 单元测试框架（仅开发依赖）。通过自动化测试保证代码质量。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此锁定文件消除了不同环境间的版本漂移，确保依赖树完全一致。但如果添加新依赖后未重新生成锁定文件，会导致安装错误。安全风险来自可能包含已知漏洞的过时包；建议定期运行 npm audit 并更新依赖。引擎约束强制了特定 Node.js 范围，不满足条件的运行时环境将无法部署。
